args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: Hono, HonoOptions, Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Factory class creates Hono apps and handlers. Supports 1-10 handler merging with extended Env types.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute, getPattern, splitRoutingPath
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities. Returns matched route info, path, and basePath with parameter expansion.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSContextInit, SendOptions, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse, StatusCode
- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper. WSContext controls WebSocket lifecycle. Event listener setup for open/message/close/error.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Context, parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned, Cookie, CookieOptions, CookiePrefixOptions, SignedCookie
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie helpers. Read/set signed/unsigned cookies. Supports __Secure- and __Host- prefix rules.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: hc, Client, ClientRequestOptions, ExecutionContext, Hono, Schema, UnionToIntersection, ExtractEnv
- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Creates test client from Hono app. Uses client-side hc with custom fetch adapter for request simulation.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Context, globalThis, navigator, Deno, EdgeRuntime, fastly, process
- Neighbor files: None in exact list
- Safe summary: Runtime detection utility. Returns env object based on platform: node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light.

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
- Reads as: raw, DOM_RENDERER, createCssJsxDomObjects, HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper. Template strings compile to CSS classes. Async rendering with style injection on client.

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, toHash, normalizeLabel, isValidClassName, isValidKeyframeName, defaultOnInvalidSlug, minify, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
- Reads as: none
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: CSS utilities. Hash generation, class name validation, minification. Common functions used by css helper.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: HTTPException, RequestHeader, Request, Headers, fetch
- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper. Strips hop-by-hop headers. Supports RFC 9110 Connection header validation.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute, getColorEnabled, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Development utilities. Prints route table with methods/paths/names. Color output option.

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString, HtmlEscaped, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks
- Neighbor files: None in exact list
- Safe summary: HTML escaping helper. Template strings escape special chars. Supports async and callback-based rendering.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult
- Reads as: ssg, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: Static site generation. Fetches routes, saves to FS. Plugins for hooks. Middleware for param injection.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, BeforeRequestHook, AfterResponseHook, AfterGenerateHook, defaultExtensionMap, determineExtension, generateFilePath, parseResponseContent, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks
- Reads as: Hono, Env, Schema, createPool, getExtension, replaceUrlParam, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths, dirname, ensureWithinOutDir
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Safe summary: Core SSG logic. Concurrent route fetching. File writing with extension mapping. Hook composition utilities.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Hono, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Env, RouterRoute, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Safe summary: Path utilities. Join/dirmname. Filter static-only routes. Detect dynamic segments with : or *.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParam, SSGParams, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE
- Reads as: Context, Env, MiddlewareHandler, isDynamicRoute
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware. ssgParams attaches params to request. isSSGContext checks SSG mode. disableSSG/onlySSG guard handlers.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
- Reads as: stream, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingApi
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming utilities. Reusable stream wrapper. SSE and text helpers for chunked responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Context, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Base streaming helper. TransformStream for chunked writes. Bun v1.1.27 compatibility for cancel() handling.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: Context, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Server-sent events stream. Formats data: event/id/retry lines. Chunked transfer with text/event-stream content type.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Context, TEXT_PLAIN, StreamingApi, stream
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper. Sets Content-Type text/plain. Adds nosniff header. Uses base stream.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: accepts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Accept header parsing. Matches supported types with quality sort. Falls back to default.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch, accepts
- Reads as: Context, parseAccept, AcceptHeader
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Safe summary: Accept header utility. Parse header, sort by q value. Returns best match or default.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: none
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Connection info exports. Types only. Re-exports from types.ts.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Context
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Connection info types. Remote address, port, transport. IPv6/IPv4 type. GetConnInfo function type.
